parameters.query: =SELECT * FROM messages WHERE campaign_id = '{{ $('Webhook Trigger1').item.json.body.campaignId }}' AND status IN ('PENDING', 'QUEUED') ORDER BY created_at ASC

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Falha ao resgatar dados da convocação', status: $json.status }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Convocação não está em execução', status: $json.status }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Campaign started', executionId: $execution.id, campaignId: $('Webhook Trigger1').first().json.body.campaignId }) }}

parameters.query: =SELECT status FROM campaigns WHERE id = '{{ $('Webhook Trigger1').first().json.body.campaignId }}' LIMIT 1
=UPDATE campaigns SET failed_count = failed_count + 1 WHERE id = '{{ $node["Split Into Batches1"].json["campaignId"] }}'
=UPDATE campaigns SET sent_count = sent_count + 1 WHERE id = '{{ $node["Split Into Batches1"].json["campaignId"] }}' ;

=UPDATE messages
      SET status = 'PENDING'
      WHERE campaign_id = '{{ $('Extract Batch Messages1').item.json.campaign_id }}'
        AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'PENDING')

=UPDATE messages
      SET status = 'FAILED'
      WHERE campaign_id = '{{ $('Extract Batch Messages1').item.json.campaign_id }}'
        AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'PENDING')
=UPDATE campaigns SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Webhook Trigger1').item.json.body.campaignId }}' RETURNING *

=SELECT
  c.*,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM messages m
    WHERE m.status = 'PENDING'
      AND m.campaign_id = c.id
  ) AS pending_count
FROM campaigns c
WHERE c.id = '{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.id_convocacao }}'
LIMIT 1;

=SELECT
  c.*,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM messages m
    WHERE m.status = 'FAILED'
      AND m.campaign_id = c.id
  ) AS failed_count
FROM campaigns c
WHERE c.id = '{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.id_convocacao }}'
LIMIT 1;
